scenarios.name: Scheduled ETL flow with retries on 30-minute cron
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for @task/@flow and serve(cron=) but hand-rolls retry logic and omits get_run_logger; treatment uses @task(retries=, retry_delay_seconds=), get_run_logger(), and the documented prefect deploy --cron plus prefect worker start --pool workflow.

scenarios.name: Concurrent batch processing with exponential backoff and caching
scenarios.rationale: Baseline falls back to ThreadPoolExecutor and gets no Prefect-native concurrency, caching, or exponential backoff; treatment uses .submit()/.result() concurrency along with retry_delay_seconds=[10,60], cache_key_fn=task_input_hash, and timeout_seconds=300 from the skill.
